creator: lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.br
text:
I found some websites of consultoring with same problem, if the removal will not be possible, has still one to bring up to date.

- Europe

URL: http://mavericks.critesclan.com/

URL: http://www.clue.com/

Status: [UPDATE] 
Reference: FSC Internet
URL: http://www.fscinternet.com/

In September 2005, FSC Internet Corp. became Assurent Secure Technologies.

On April 10 2006, Assurent was acquired by TELUS Corporation, and became a key part of TELUS Business Resiliency Services, a part of the TELUS Business Solutions business unit.

Update website for: http://www.assurent.com/

Status: [FORBIDDEN] 
Reference: MindStep Corp. 
URL: http://www.mindstep.com/gui

Thanks dears! :)
